2. How tools are rendered inside ToolPanel (especially mindmap)

4. How the tool panel interacts with the parent layout

Focus on: src/components/tools/tool-panel.tsx, live-mindmap.tsx, and any related layout components.

Report file paths, key code sections, and current layout behavior.

content.text:
Based on my exploration of the codebase, here's a comprehensive analysis of how tools are displayed in your UI: ## Tool Display Architecture ### 1. ToolPanel Component Structure **File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/components/tools/tool-panel.tsx` **Key Characteristics:** - Responsive container that adapts between embedded and standalone modes - Fixed heights when standalone: `h-[70vh]` (70% viewport height) or `h-16` (minimized) - Full height when `embedded={true}` (scales to parent container) - Header with maestro avatar, tool label, and control buttons (minimize/close) - Content area with `flex-1 overflow-auto` for scrollable tool content - Animated with Framer Motion (fade + slide transitions) **Layout Props:** ```typescript interface ToolPanelProps { tool: ToolState | null; maestro: { name; avatar; color } | null; onClose: () => void; isMinimized?: boolean; onToggleMinimize?: () => void; embedded?: boolean; // true = fills parent; false = fixed height box sessionId?: string | null; // for voice command support } ``` --- ### 2. Tool Rendering Hierarchy **Current Tool Types & Renderers:** | Tool Type | Renderer Component | Height | Features | |-----------|-------------------|--------|----------| | mindmap | `LiveMindmap` → `InteractiveMarkMapRenderer` | 500px content | Real-time voice commands, zoom, pan, fullscreen | | quiz | `QuizTool` | Flexible | Question-based, scoring, XP rewards | | flashcard | `FlashcardTool` | Flexible | FSRS algorithm, spaced repetition | | demo | `DemoSandbox` | 300px min | iframe sandbox, interactive HTML/CSS/JS | | search | `SearchResults` | Flexible | Web + YouTube results display | | summary | `SummaryTool` or `StudentSummaryEditor` | Flexible | AI-generated or student-written summaries | --- ### 3. Fullscreen & Zoom Behavior **Current Implementation:** **Mindmap-specific (InteractiveMarkMapRenderer):** - Fullscreen toggle: `handleFullscreen()` uses native `requestFullscreen()` API - Zoom controls: 0.5x to 3x range with `rescale()` method - Container: `fixed inset-0 z-50` when fullscreen - Mindmap SVG container: `500px` height normal, `calc(100vh - 60px)` fullscreen - Pan/Zoom enabled: `zoom: true, pan: true` in Markmap config - Reset view: `fit()` method centers mindmap - Toolbar controls: - Zoom In/Out buttons (`ZoomIn`, `ZoomOut` icons) - Reset view (`RotateCcw`) - Fullscreen toggle (`Maximize`/`Minimize`) - Download (PNG with expanded labels) - Print (landscape A4, with font scaling) - Accessibility mode toggle - Undo support **General ToolPanel:** - No native fullscreen at panel level (mindmap handles its own) - Minimize to header only: `h-16` - Expand to full container: toggle `isMinimized` state --- ### 4. Parent Layout Integration **Layout Pattern: Two Contexts** #### A. ConversationFlow (Voice Conference Layout) **File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/components/conversation/conversation-flow.tsx` (lines 600-650) ``` When activeTool exists: ├─ Layout: flex-col with tool taking priority ├─ Tool Panel (70% of remaining space) - EMBEDDED MODE │ └─ ToolPanel embedded={true} → h-full │ └─ Fills flex-[7] container ├─ Mini Chat (15% of remaining space) │ └─ Shows last 3 messages only └─ Input Area (5%) └─ Tool buttons + text input ``` **Key Usage:** ```tsx setActiveTool(null)} isMinimized={isToolMinimized} onToggleMinimize={() => setIsToolMinimized(!isToolMinimized)} embedded={true} // ← Fills container instead of fixed height sessionId={voiceSessionId} /> ``` #### B. CharacterChatView (Side-by-Side Layout) **File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/components/conversation/character-chat-view.tsx` (lines 686-703) ``` Chat Layout (always visible): ├─ Messages panel (flex-1) └─ Input area (p-4) When activeTool exists (conditional): ├─ Add Tool Panel (right side) │ └─ Fixed width: w-[400px] │ └─ ToolPanel embedded={true} inside └─ Voice Panel (bottom right when active) ``` **Key Usage:** ```tsx {hasActiveTool && (
)} ``` --- ### 5. How Tools Are Instantiated **ToolPanel Content Rendering** (lines 82-146): ```typescript const renderToolContent = () => { switch (tool.type) { case 'mindmap': { // Use LiveMindmap if sessionId available (voice commands) if (sessionId) { return ; } // Fallback to static MarkMapRenderer return ; } case 'quiz': return ; case 'flashcard': return ; case 'demo': return ; case 'search': return ; case 'summary': { // Student summary (maieutic method) if (summaryContent.type === 'student_summary') { return ; } return ; } } }; ``` --- ### 6. LiveMindmap & Voice Integration **File:** `/Users/roberdan/GitHub/ConvergioEdu/src/components/tools/live-mindmap.tsx` **Real-time Modification Methods** (exposed via `useImperativeHandle`): ```typescript - addNode(concept, parentNode?) - expandNode(nodeLabel, suggestions?) - deleteNode(nodeLabel) - focusNode(nodeLabel) // Scrolls & highlights - setNodeColor(nodeLabel, color) - connectNodes(nodeA, nodeB) - undo() ``` **SSE Event Listening:** - Connects to `/api/tools/mindmap-events` via `useMindmapModifications` hook - Receives voice command transformations in real-time - Updates state and re-renders SVG --- ### 7. Tool-Specific Rendering Details **InteractiveMarkMapRenderer:** - Converts nodes → markdown → markmap SVG - Toolbar: 9 buttons for controls - Mindmap container: Centers SVG, supports grab cursor - Accessibility: High contrast, dyslexia font, large text support - Exports: PNG download, print to PDF, markdown download **DemoSandbox:** - Wraps HTML in iframe with CSP sandbox - Refresh button to reload - Container: `flex-1 mx-4 mb-4 min-h-[300px]` - Supports inline CSS/JS execution **StudentSummaryEditor:** - Layout: Sidebar (section nav) + Main editor - Can toggle sidebar visibility with `Layout` icon - Tracks word count, last saved time - Inline comments with resolved state - Saves to `/api/tools/saved` endpoint --- ### 8. Container Sizing Rules | Scenario | Height | Width | Classes | |----------|--------|-------|---------| | Standalone (not minimized) | `h-[70vh]` | Auto | `rounded-xl shadow-xl border` | | Standalone (minimized) | `h-16` | Auto | Same (shows header only) | | Embedded in ConversationFlow | `h-full` | 100% | `flex-[7]` (70% of space) | | Embedded in CharacterChatView | `h-full` | `w-[400px]` | `flex-shrink-0 rounded-xl` | | Fullscreen Mindmap | `calc(100vh - 60px)` | 100vw | `fixed inset-0 z-50` | --- ## Key Observations 1. **Adaptive Rendering**: ToolPanel switches between `LiveMindmap` (with voice) and `MarkMapRenderer` (static) based on sessionId presence 2. **Two Layout Paradigms**: - **Voice Conference**: Tools dominant (70%), chat secondary - **Text Chat**: Tools sidebar (fixed 400px), chat takes rest 3. **Zoom/Fullscreen**: Only mindmaps have built-in zoom. Other tools rely on parent container scrolling 4. **Memory Footprint**: SVG mindmaps are re-rendered on every node change (no diffing), but Markmap handles optimization internally 5. **Accessibility First**: High contrast mode changes colors, dyslexia font available, aria labels on all controls Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific tool renderer or layout scenario?
